label: Think node chance per hour (constant)
description: Chance-gated node with a fixed mean time between triggers. Private fields mtbHours and mtbDays are XML-backed. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

mtbHours.label: MTB hours
mtbHours.description: Mean time between triggers in game hours. Private in C# source but loaded from XML. -1 means disabled; overridden by mtbDays when mtbDays > 0.

mtbDays.label: MTB days
mtbDays.description: Mean time between triggers in game days. Private in C# source but loaded from XML. When > 0, overrides mtbHours (converted to hours internally).
